# PRIVACY GOVERNANCE LAYER

Status: Initial GDPR / Europe-readiness infrastructure layer

Purpose:
Govern identity, consent, lawful basis, erasure, restriction, portability, and privacy proof without breaking artifact law.

Core rule:
Truth remains protected.
Identity remains controllable.
Consent becomes provable.
Erasure becomes executable without destroying lineage.

This layer is shared-core infrastructure.
It is not DICE, AIOP, FundTrackerAI, TPS, PAID, or a product surface.
